mapper.select: SELECT symbol_code, SUM(winning_number) AS 'sumWinningNumber' FROM t_apply_new_shares_order WHERE `status` = 2 AND user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY symbol_code
SELECT SUM(winning_number) AS 'sumWinningNumber' FROM t_apply_new_shares_order WHERE `status` = 2 AND user_id = #{userId} and symbol_code=#{symbolCode}
